title: Chrome DevTools Remote Debug Android Devices
citation: Chrome for Developers. Remote debug Android devices. Accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Planning source for USB debugging, chrome://inspect device discovery, Android Debug Bridge, and Chrome DevTools Protocol forwarding.
claims_supported: Chrome DevTools can discover USB-debuggable Android devices through chrome://inspect.
A user must enable USB debugging and accept the debugging authorization prompt on the device.
ADB can forward the Chrome DevTools remote socket to a local port such as 9222.
DevTools screencasting can affect frame rates and should be disabled for accurate performance measurement.
claims_not_supported: That Meta Quest Browser exposes every performance signal needed for production XR certification.
That automated headset testing is solved by USB debugging alone.
